Name: Alpha
Info: Known as the "Crimson Countess," she keeps secrets and an unspoken past hidden behind her eyes.

Name: Veronica
Info: She walks through the mist alone, distant and proud. But behind the name "Bloodthirsty Siren," there seems to be another side no one knows.

Name: Kamui
Info: Behind the renown of the "Revenant Hunter" lies an old secret best left unspoken.
